name: diligence-core
description: Creative Strategies research on company and industry fundamentals across the AI stack and beyond. Paid Diligence Stack access required.

interface.longDescription: Use Creative Strategies' Diligence Stack subscriber research to build company packets and market primers, audit evidence quality, optionally synthesize separately entitled equity research, and produce decision-ready diligence. A paid Diligence Stack subscription is required for portal and MCP access.
defaultPrompt: Build a source-linked diligence brief on this company.
Build a driver model with evidence-linked assumptions.
Turn this thesis into a monitoring dashboard.
